descriptionInUI: Shows each pilot a short on-screen card -- campaign, mission number, date, mission time, callsign, aircraft, task, and departure field -- when they slot into an aircraft (S_EVENT_BIRTH), the way the professional DCS campaigns greet you at mission start. Fires at mission start in single-player and whenever a pilot slots in / rejoins on a server. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.briefing (the 'Mission-start briefing popup' setting is on and the mission has a player-crewed flight). Display only -- no gameplay change. Card duration and the startup grace are options below.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Seconds the briefing card stays on screen
Startup grace before the mission-start sweep (s)
